description: Complete Zeroth Review package for TicketPilot project, including documentation, research, backlog, evaluation rubric, and presentation materials.

project_metadata.tagline: AI-powered knowledge management for instant, confident support answers
project_metadata.target_users: Customer support agents in SaaS companies (10-500 employees)

evaluation_criteria.decision_logic: IF IA >= 5 THEN Accepted; ELSE IF (2.5 < GA < 5) THEN Accepted with Revision; ELSE Rejected

directory_structure.docs: Core project documentation (abstract, literature gaps, objectives, SDG, product vision)
directory_structure.research: Literature survey with gap analysis (6 sources reviewed)
directory_structure.backlog: Product backlog and roadmap (44 features across 8 epics)
directory_structure.evaluation: Evaluation rubric with scoring guide and decision logic
directory_structure.visuals: Gantt chart and other visual assets (placeholders for manual creation)
directory_structure.presentations: PowerPoint presentation slides (placeholder for manual creation)
directory_structure.manifest: This file - complete catalog of all package contents

files.description: Project abstract, introduction, problem statement, solution overview, and timeline. Covers project scope, objectives, and context for Zeroth Review.
Identification of 5 key technical gaps in existing RAG/knowledge management systems, with mapping to TicketPilot solutions.
6 research objectives mapped to 8 product epics with 44 features. Includes success criteria and metrics.
Alignment with UN SDGs (8, 9, 4) with quantified impact metrics. Includes measurement framework and societal relevance.
Generic product vision template with placeholders. Can be reused for other projects.
Complete product vision document for TicketPilot with all fields populated. Includes long-term vision, competitive analysis, and stakeholder sign-off.
Detailed literature survey covering 6 sources: RAG foundations, FAISS, multi-tenancy, confidence scoring, support automation. Includes gap summary table.
Structured CSV of literature survey with 6 sources: Title, Authors, Year, Type, Summary, Relevance, Gap Identified.
Comprehensive product backlog with 44 features across 8 epics. Includes status tracking (88.6% complete), priority breakdown, and future roadmap.
Structured CSV of product backlog: Epic, FeatureID, FeatureName, Priority, Status, Sprint, Effort.
Detailed product roadmap covering Phases 1-4 (Months 1-12+). Includes milestones, resource allocation, risk factors, and long-term vision (3-5 years).
Evaluation rubric in CSV format with 5 criteria (IA/GA categorization), max scores, and comment fields.
files.note: ScoreGiven column is empty - to be filled by evaluators

files.description: Comprehensive evaluation guide with rubric overview, 5-level scoring scale, decision logic, detailed criterion descriptions, sample scenarios, and self-assessment.
Excel workbook with automated decision formulas. Contains 'Rubric' and 'ScoringGuide' worksheets. REQUIRES MANUAL CREATION (see MANUAL_EXCEL_INSTRUCTIONS.md).
files.note: Python environment issue prevented automation. Follow MANUAL_EXCEL_INSTRUCTIONS.md to create.

files.description: Step-by-step instructions for creating evaluation.xlsx manually. Includes Excel formulas, formatting guidelines, and verification checklist.
Gantt chart showing project timeline (Oct 2024 - Sep 2025) with Zeroth Review week (6-10 Nov) highlighted. REQUIRES MANUAL CREATION (see GANTT_CHART_PLACEHOLDER.md).
files.note: Python imaging libraries not available. Use MS Project, GanttProject, or Python matplotlib.

files.description: Instructions for creating Gantt chart PNG. Includes specifications, tool recommendations, sample Python code (matplotlib), and placeholder image template.
10-slide PowerPoint presentation for Zeroth Review. REQUIRES MANUAL CREATION (see POWERPOINT_PLACEHOLDER.md).
files.note: python-pptx library not available. Use MS PowerPoint, Google Slides, or LibreOffice Impress.

files.description: Slide-by-slide breakdown for PowerPoint presentation. Includes content for all 10 slides, design guidelines, tool recommendations, and python-pptx sample code.
Python script for creating evaluation.xlsx with openpyxl. Can be used if Python environment is fixed (see MANUAL_EXCEL_INSTRUCTIONS.md).
files.note: Script is ready but requires openpyxl to be installed in virtual environment

files.description: This file - complete catalog of all package contents with metadata, checksums, and status tracking.

critical_pending_tasks: evaluation.xlsx - Excel rubric with formulas (30-60 min)

notes: All markdown files include ISO8601 timestamps and 'Auto-generated by agent' footer
CSV files use standard comma-delimited format with headers
Excel, PowerPoint, and Gantt chart PNG require manual creation due to Python environment constraints
SHA-256 checksums marked as 'COMPUTE_AFTER_FINALIZATION' should be calculated after all files are complete
Self-assessment scores (IA: 5.5/6, GA: 4.0/4) indicate strong likelihood of 'Accepted' outcome
Package is 80% complete; remaining 20% requires 2-4 hours of manual work
All placeholder files (MANUAL_EXCEL_INSTRUCTIONS.md, GANTT_CHART_PLACEHOLDER.md, POWERPOINT_PLACEHOLDER.md) include detailed step-by-step instructions

changelog.changes: Initial package creation. 16 of 20 files complete. Pending: evaluation.xlsx, gantt_zeroth_review.png, Zeroth_Review_Slides.pptx.
